mskcc isoform override; ENST00000579755.1 (p14) + ENST00000304494.5 (p16).  ENST00000579755 is MANE plus clinical p14, ENST00000304494 is (p16 MANE. Germline transcript is MANE plus clinical. This transcript matches in a lot of ways, however the germline transcript is shorter.

mskcc isoform override; According to UCSC oncogenic mutation F232 matches ENST00000381566 and clinical transcript. ENST00000400841.2 has 255aa and ENST00000400841.8 has 371 aa. They are an 100% overlap but not exact match. ENST00000400841.8 has additional aminoacids on N terminal. ENST00000400841.8 is MANE select.
